s.t: EcoTech Solutions’ documentation reveals several related party transactions (RPTs) that require close examination due to their potential implications for governance and financial transparency. These transactions include the acquisition of SolarBright Technologies     , intercompany dealings between EcoTech GmbH and its U.S. parent company involving transfer pricing     , and executive-controlled agreements. Each of these transactions has been identified in specific documents, which provide detailed insights into the nature and scope of the RPTs.
